home.title: Didždvario College
home.subtitle: Parent-Teacher Meeting Booking System
home.heroDescription: Choose a teacher, pick a suitable 10-minute time slot, and keep every meeting organised in one clear place.
home.card1Text: Find the right teacher, compare available times, and reserve one or two 10-minute slots without waiting for emails or paper forms.
home.card2Text: Use a calendar view to see your available days, generate meeting slots quickly, and keep your consultation schedule easy to follow.
home.card3Text: Administrators can open registration, prepare teacher consultation times centrally, and manage changes from one dashboard.

login.registerSubtitle: Create your teacher account and begin managing meetings.
login.name: Name
login.subject: Subject

parentLogin.loginSubtitle: Log in to view and manage your child's bookings.

booking.selectSlot: Select a slot to confirm your booking
booking.parentContactNote: At least one contact method is required.
booking.selectSlotAlert: Please select one or two slots first.
booking.signedInAs: You are signed in as {{name}}. Your email is pre-filled.

myTimes.title: My Times
myTimes.subtitle: Create and manage your available meeting slots for parents to book.
myTimes.noSlotsCreated: No slots created for this date. Create some below!
myTimes.pleaseSelectValidTime: Please select a valid start time and slot count.
myTimes.slotInstructions: Each slot is fixed at 10 minutes. Meetings can be created from 12:00 to 19:00.

errors.selectStartAndEnd: Please select start time and end time.
errors.invalidStartOrEnd: Please enter a valid start time and end time.
errors.endMustBeAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
errors.maxSlots: Maximum 42 slots allowed. Reduce the time window.
errors.outsideMeetingWindow: Meetings can only be created between 12:00 and 19:00.

teacherSlots.title: Available Slots
teacherSlots.subtitle: Select one or two 10-minute slots and book your meeting.
teacherSlots.selectMaxTwoAlert: You can select a maximum of 2 slots for a longer meeting.
teacherSlots.selectSlotAlert: Please select one or two slots to book.

teacherDashboard.title: Teacher Dashboard
teacherDashboard.subtitle: Quick access to create slots and view registration details.
teacherDashboard.manageSlotsText: Create available appointment times for parents to book.
teacherDashboard.viewRegistrationsText: See registered meetings and cancel if needed.

parentDashboard.subtitle: Your booked meetings and appointment history.
parentDashboard.noBookings: No bookings found yet. Browse teachers and reserve a slot.

registrations.title: Registrations
registrations.subtitle: Review parent bookings and cancel if needed.

admin.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage teachers, parents, bookings, and appointment slots across the whole site.
admin.loginError: Unable to log in as admin
admin.dashboardSubtitle: Central control for accounts, slots, bookings, and teacher setup across the whole appointment system.
admin.registrationPeriodSubtitle: Open or close parent booking centrally for the current meeting period.
admin.databaseSetupRequired: Database setup required: run backend/db/schema.sql in Supabase to enable this control.
admin.registrationPeriodHelp: Parents can only select and book slots when this period is open and the current time is inside the saved date range.
admin.createConsultationSlotsSubtitle: Choose a teacher and use the calendar workflow to create 10-minute appointments between 12:00 and 19:00.
admin.searchTeacherPlaceholder: Search teacher by name, subject, room, or email
admin.noSlotsForTeacherDate: No slots created for this teacher on the selected date.
admin.addTeachersSubtitle: Create one teacher manually or bulk import a teacher list. The import area accepts any file upload, but the system can only automatically create teacher accounts when it can read teacher rows in a structured format like `name,email,subject,room,password`.
admin.teacherFullNameHelp: Enter the teacher's full name exactly as you want it shown to parents.
admin.teacherEmailHelp: This is the email the teacher will use to log in.
admin.mainSubjectHelp: Enter the main subject parents should see for this teacher.
admin.roomHelp: Use the room number where the meeting should happen.
admin.temporaryPasswordHelp: Give the teacher a starter password they can use for their first login.
admin.uploadHelp: CSV, TXT, and JSON can be imported directly. Images, PDFs, and other files are accepted too, but they still need readable teacher rows inside them before accounts can be created.
admin.teachersSubtitle: Review teacher accounts, imported subjects, and remove records when needed.
admin.parentsSubtitle: Review parent accounts and remove access when necessary.
admin.registrationsSubtitle: See every booking and cancel it from one place.
admin.slotsSubtitle: Inspect every appointment slot and remove bad or outdated entries.
admin.selectTeacherForSlots: Select the teacher you want to create slots for.
admin.outsideMeetingWindow: Meetings can only be created between 12:00 and 19:00.
admin.selectSlotToDelete: Select at least one slot to delete.
admin.confirmDeleteSlots: Delete {{count}} selected slot(s)? Any registrations for those slots will also be removed.
admin.selectTeacherToDelete: Select at least one teacher to delete.
admin.confirmDeleteTeachers: Delete {{count}} selected teacher(s)? Their slots and registrations will also be removed.
admin.selectParentToDelete: Select at least one parent to delete.
admin.confirmDeleteParents: Delete {{count}} selected parent(s)? Their registrations will also be removed.
admin.fileLoadedWarning: File loaded. The uploader accepts any file type, but automatic teacher creation works only when the file contains readable teacher rows such as CSV, TXT, or JSON. If this is an image or document, paste the extracted teacher list into the box below in the shown format.
admin.pasteRowsFirst: Paste teacher rows or upload a CSV/JSON file first.
admin.unableParseImport: Unable to parse the import file. Use CSV, TXT, or JSON.
admin.noTeacherRecords: No teacher records were found in the import.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
